name: SKIL Infrastructure Limited
summary: SKIL Infrastructure Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the infrastructure development business in India. It develops various projects, such as seaports, logistics, railways, defense shipyards, offshore asset construction yards, special economic zones, and smart cities in the private sector. The company was formerly known as Horizon Infrastructure Limited and changed its name to SKIL Infrastructure Limited in January 2014. SKIL Infrastructure Limited was incorporated in 1983 is based in Mumbai, India.
